user_query: I want to gather the voting details for a YouTube video. Can you fetch the voting information for the video with the ID 'h1PYEJOhAiI'? Furthermore, get the details of the channel's videos and the streamer information.

TaskList.description: Fetch the voting details for the YouTube video with ID 'h1PYEJOhAiI'.
Fetch the details of other videos from the same channel as the video with ID 'h1PYEJOhAiI'.
Get the streamer information for the channel that posted the video with ID 'h1PYEJOhAiI'.
